title: The Wicket Gate
subtitle: Knocking while accusation flies
intro: The gate is smaller than your fear expected, and brighter than your shame can bear.
Behind you, accusations fly: not clean enough, not sincere enough, not one of the welcomed ones.
A narrow gate does not ask you to become worthy in the road dust. It asks you to knock.
intro_zh: 窄门在前方，控告像箭一样催你退后。
你没有资格夸口，却仍可以叩门，因为怜悯邀请有重担的人来。
善意不是奖赏强者，而是把求怜悯的人拉进门内。
spiritual_theme: Faith that asks, and grace that receives
spiritual_theme_zh: 在控告中祈求怜悯，进入窄门
core_mechanic: Press through arrows of accusation, refuse the urge to look back, and knock until Goodwill draws you safely through.
core_mechanic_zh: 在箭矢与控告中叩门，让善意把你拉进门内。

design.provenance: Attachment Ch2 窄门 (Skill 16). Added a gate prayer-chapel this pass.

seven_beats.arrival: A narrow cliff path; arrows of accusation hiss from behind, urging a backward glance.
seven_beats.orientation: The small narrow gate stands ahead with a cross carved over it; a gate chapel waits just inside.
seven_beats.encounter: You knock, and Goodwill takes your hand and draws you through.
seven_beats.temptation: Shame whispering that the gate will never open for one like you.
seven_beats.choice: Knock and ask / press through the arrows / look back toward the city.
seven_beats.consequence: Knocking lifts faith and quiets fear and despair; looking back deepens shame.
seven_beats.grace: Goodwill admits you to the true way; kneel and give thanks at the gate chapel.

primary_temptation.hook_zh: 你这样的人，门岂会为你开？

design.stat_arc_note: Faith rises and fear/despair fall as the gate opens to the asking.
